basic_details.job_title: RSLSA Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Rajasthan State Legal Services Authority (RSLSA) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Panel Advocate Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 15-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Advocate enrolled with Bar Council with more than 1 year regular practice experience as per Advocates Act 1961
qualification.details: Advocate enrolled with Bar Council with more than 1 year regular practice experience as per Advocates Act 1961.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Scrutiny of Applications Selection based on Seniority of Practice and Experience Merit List Preparation
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RSLSA Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: pali.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
